title: Polymorphic crypto-primitive composition audit
hypothesis: Target {'name': 'libcrypto'} may compose 6 crypto-primitive patterns unsafely.
draft_poc_outline:
# cbc_ecb_mix: grep for AES-CBC and AES-ECB composed in same code path
# mac_order: grep for MAC-then-encrypt vs encrypt-then-MAC mismatch
# constant_time: grep for Constant-time violation in comparison
# iv_reuse: grep for IV reuse across messages
# prng_seed: grep for PRNG seeded with time() or hardcoded value
# hardcoded_salt: grep for Hardcoded salt in hash function
